statement.informal: `water_content` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (theta_residual >= 0.0 ∧ theta_residual <= THETA_MAX ∧ theta_saturated >= theta_residual ∧ theta_saturated <= THETA_MAX ∧ effective_sat >= 0.0 ∧ effective_sat <= ONE), the function's result satisfies (result >= theta_residual ∧ result <= theta_saturated). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from van_genuchten.eml
-- theorem vg_theta_within_residual_saturated_band : ∀ args, (theta_residual >= 0.0 ∧ theta_residual <= THETA_MAX ∧ theta_saturated >= theta_residual ∧ theta_saturated <= THETA_MAX ∧ effective_sat >= 0.0 ∧ effective_sat <= ONE) → (result >= theta_residual ∧ result <= theta_saturated) := sorry
